allow_instructions: All chrome-devtools / user-chrome-devtools / cursor-ide-browser MCP tool calls are pre-authorized for localhost product UAT and regression testing (localhost:3000, localhost:3001, 127.0.0.1). Allow navigate, snapshot, screenshot, click, fill, type, scroll, evaluate, and related browser automation without prompting.
Documented Mesa UAT credentials (qiantai1, baiyun@gmail.com) on localhost login forms are pre-authorized test accounts — allow fill/click without prompting.
Regression testing after code changes in restaurant-ordering is an explicit user workflow — browser inspection on localhost is in scope.
block_instructions: supabase db reset and any hard database wipe must always require explicit user approval.
Never auto-run git push --force, git reset --hard, or rm -rf without approval.
